notes: Starter v0.2 — passport_validity rescue rows (cycle 3 focus) + controls bucket covering family-adjacent figurative and polarity-inversion patterns for all six in-scope families (passport_validity, age_range, us_visa, stcw_basic, certificate_requirement, rank_match). Once these labels and patterns are validated against the legacy parser on main (commit 81f6a2f), the other five families' rescue rows can be added incrementally in the same PR.

passport_validity.prompt: 8 months remaining on passport
passport_validity.note: Number-first word order with 'remaining'; legacy window_patterns require 'passport valid(ity)' adjacency.

passport_validity.prompt: passport with 6 months left
passport_validity.note: 'months left' phrasing absent from legacy patterns.

passport_validity.prompt: passport valid for at least 1 year
passport_validity.note: Legacy catches boolean passport validity but drops the year-unit minimum. Convention: 1 year -> 12 months.

passport_validity.prompt: passport valid for 2 years
passport_validity.note: Legacy catches boolean passport validity but drops the year-unit minimum. Convention: 2 years -> 24 months.

passport_validity.prompt: passport expiring within 3 months should be rejected
passport_validity.note: 'Expiring within X months' is an inverse phrasing the LLM should interpret as 'must have X+ months remaining'. Convention call: human review the boundary.

passport_validity.prompt: freshly renewed passport
passport_validity.note: Renewed/fresh implies valid; no explicit 'valid' keyword.

passport_validity.prompt: newly issued passport
passport_validity.note: Newly issued implies valid; no explicit 'valid' keyword.

passport_validity.prompt: passport not expired
passport_validity.note: Negation of expiry == validity intent. Distinguish from polarity-inversion controls like 'expired passport OK'.

passport_validity.prompt: ensure passport is current
passport_validity.note: Legacy fallback may fire due to 'current' context word but with no 'passport ... valid' adjacency the requested_label may be wrong. Manually verify.

passport_validity.prompt: passport must have minimum 6 months validity remaining
passport_validity.note: Legacy may catch boolean validity but not the months value due to 'minimum' interspersed with 'validity remaining' phrasing.

passport_validity.prompt: candidate should hold a passport that doesn't expire in the next year
passport_validity.note: Conditional expiry phrasing. Convention: 'in the next year' -> 12 months minimum remaining.

passport_validity.prompt: passport remaining validity of 9 months
passport_validity.note: 'remaining validity' phrasing absent from legacy patterns.

passport_validity.prompt: valid US visa and passport
passport_validity.note: Compound prompt: legacy us_visa parser may catch 'US visa' but passport_validity expression is parsed weakly because 'valid' is shared. Multi-family expected; LLM should emit both.

passport_validity.prompt: needs a fresh passport for joining vessel
passport_validity.note: 'Fresh passport' as informal validity. Joining-vessel context shouldn't change family.

passport_validity.prompt: passport should be valid through end of 2028
passport_validity.note: Date-based expiry. Legacy fallback may fire from 'valid' context but cannot compute months remaining (depends on evaluation date). Convention: drop minimum_months_remaining for date-based prompts and surface as date-based hard filter when supported.

passport_validity.prompt: the candidate carries a passport with no validity issues
passport_validity.note: Indirect validity expression; no explicit 'valid' adjacent to 'passport'.

passport_validity.prompt: passport validity 12+ months
passport_validity.note: Compact '12+' notation; legacy patterns expect 'at least' / 'minimum' qualifiers or a months-prefix.

passport_validity.prompt: must have indian passport with valid OCI
passport_validity.note: Legacy parses 'must have...valid passport' family but OCI mention is not a separate family (out of catalog). Expected: passport_validity only, OCI as semantic_query material.

passport_validity.prompt: passport with at least six months till expiry
passport_validity.note: Spelled-out number + 'till expiry' phrasing absent from legacy patterns.

passport_validity.prompt: candidates whose passport has at least 6 months left before it expires
passport_validity.note: Verbose recruiter phrasing. Same intent as canonical 'passport valid for at least 6 months'.

controls.prompt: no passport required for this position
controls.note: Polarity inversion: explicit 'no passport required'. Legacy currently fires passport_validity; shadow/active normalizer must veto this.
Figurative 'without passport restrictions' — does not assert passport requirement.
Polarity inversion: opposite of must_be_valid intent.
Wrong sense — 'passport' refers to photo format, not the document. Legacy currently fires passport_validity; shadow/active normalizer must require document-validity context.
Polarity inversion for us_visa: 'visa-free' is the opposite of visa-required. Legacy currently fires us_visa; shadow/active normalizer must veto this.
Explicit visa polarity inversion. Legacy currently fires us_visa; shadow/active normalizer must veto this.
Figurative age expression — must NOT fire age_range. _AGE_FIGURATIVE_PATTERNS covers 'middle-aged'.
'Senior officer' is a rank descriptor, not a numeric age constraint. Should not fire age_range.
Generic 'safety training' without STCW/BST/basic cues — must not fire stcw_basic. _STCW_BASIC_CONTEXT_CUES requires explicit anchor.
'MV' as vessel prefix, NOT a Maritime Crew Visa reference. Should not fire us_visa with visa_group=australia.

controls.prompt: good candidate with stable sea service
controls.note: Qualitative recruiter prompt; should map to semantic_query only, no hard-filter family.

controls.prompt: experienced senior captain who is youthful in approach
controls.note: Two figurative age expressions ('senior captain', 'youthful') — must not fire age_range.
Generic 'certificate' without specific named certificate — must not fire certificate_requirement with empty or invented list.

controls.prompt: candidate must be flexible about rank
controls.note: Anti-constraint on rank — must not fire rank_match. Convention: ignore figurative rank phrasings.
Bare 'documents' without 'passport' keyword — must not fall through legacy passport fallback. Tests the anchor strictness.
